meta.title: 8Router — One Endpoint for Every AI Provider
meta.description: 8Router unifies 12+ AI providers into one OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Auto-routing, fallback, quota tracking, and circuit breaker.
meta.ogTitle: 8Router — One Endpoint for Every AI Provider
meta.ogDescription: Auto-routing for 12+ AI providers. One endpoint, zero downtime.
hero.badge: Open Source · v0.5.0 · Real Provider Expansion
hero.sub: Connect your AI tools, apps, and agents to one OpenAI-compatible endpoint. 8Router handles provider routing, quota tracking, circuit breaker, and fallback so your tools stay connected when keys expire or models go down.
services.title: Built for messy real-world AI workflows.
services.sub: Provider keys expire. Quotas reset. Models go down. 8Router keeps your tools connected through one local endpoint.
svc.chatDesc: Route chat requests across connected providers with health-aware fallback.
svc.apiDesc: Use one /v1 endpoint with tools that support custom OpenAI base URLs.
svc.routingDesc: Pick the right provider based on quota, health, latency, and route mode.
svc.quotaDesc: Track key usage, limits, cooldowns, and exhausted providers in one place.
svc.toolsDesc: Route tool-capable requests only to models that support function calling.
svc.streamingDesc: Fallback before streaming starts, then keep response chunks stable.
svc.embeddingsDesc: Vector embeddings endpoint with multi-provider fallback.
svc.imageDesc: Image generation endpoint with provider routing.
providers.title: 12 Providers. 3 Tiers. One Endpoint.
providers.desc: Route requests across premium, efficient, and local providers with health checks, quota awareness, circuit breaker, and fallback chains.
aliases.title: Model Aliases
aliases.desc: Use simple aliases instead of memorizing provider-specific model names.
alias.autoDesc: Best available route based on health, quota, latency, and fallback rules.
alias.cheapDesc: Chooses the cheapest healthy model available.
alias.smartDesc: Routes to the strongest available model for reasoning-heavy tasks.
alias.codingDesc: Optimized for coding, debugging, tool use, and long context tasks.
alias.localDesc: Local-only route. Never falls back to cloud providers.
aliases.note: Local mode requires Ollama, LM Studio, or another configured local provider.
how.title: How It Works
how.desc: Install once, connect your providers, and never think about rate limits again.
how.connectDesc: Add API keys or local providers from the dashboard.
how.pointDesc: Set base URL in Cursor, Cline, or OpenWebUI:
how.monitorDesc: Track quota, key health, fallback paths, and latency from the dashboard.
features.title: Built for Production
features.desc: Every feature is tested and production-ready.
feat.adaptersDesc: 12 providers with dedicated adapters for request normalization, response parsing, and health checks.
feat.capabilityDesc: 30+ models tracked for vision, tools, streaming, embeddings, context length, and cost.
feat.smartPickerDesc: Score-based model selection using cost, speed, quality, and latency data.
feat.costTableDesc: Per-model pricing with input/output token costs, currency, and free quota tracking.
feat.latencyDesc: p50/p95/p99 latency tracking per provider with automatic health monitoring.
feat.circuitDesc: Automatic provider cooldown after 5 consecutive failures. 3-minute reset window.
feat.keyPoolDesc: Track key status: healthy, rate_limited, exhausted, invalid, cooldown. Auto-skip bad keys.
feat.quotaTrackerDesc: Per-provider quota tracking across 5h, daily, weekly, and monthly periods.
feat.secretsDesc: API keys masked in all responses, logs, dashboard, and error messages.
feat.sanitizationDesc: Error messages sanitized to remove sensitive data before logging or returning.
feat.setupGuideDesc: Ready-to-copy configs for Cursor, Cline, Continue, OpenWebUI, Claude Code, and Codex.
dashboard.title: Local-First Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Monitor requests, provider health, fallback paths, and key pool status locally.
integrations.title: Compatible With Your Tools
integrations.desc: Drop-in compatible with tools that support custom OpenAI base URLs.
security.title: Production Safety
security.masking: Secret masking across logs and UI
security.warning: If you expose 8Router publicly, enable authentication and never expose raw provider keys.
tests.title: Tested Before Release
tests.desc: Every release is validated with router tests, OpenAI-compatible smoke tests, doctor diagnostics, and admin endpoint checks.
start.title: Start Routing in Under a Minute
